one_time_description: Williams Treaty Settlement payout of $1,416,625 included in annual deficit; investment returns from treaty settlement funds also impacted results
economic_notes: Casino Rama ground rent and fees are significant revenue sources. First Nation operates retail mall, country market, gas station, marina, gift shop, coffee shop, cannabis store. COVID-19 impacted operations; investment portfolio recovered during year. My Lucky Spot Entertainment Centre Ltd. had going concern disclosure for years ended December 31, 2020 and 2019.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Nine fully consolidated subsidiaries including social housing, marina, gift shop, country market/gas bar, wilderness park, coffee shop, cannabis store, and two holding companies. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Casino Rama Inc. (100%), Rama Parking Inc. (100%), My Lucky Spot Entertainment Centre Ltd. (80%). My Lucky Spot has going concern disclosure. Large portfolio investments of $173M (Scotiatrust). Williams Treaty Settlement payouts ongoing. COVID-19 note included. ISC funding calculated as sum of INAC contributions: Block $1,817,415 + Fixed $2,026,390 + Set $39,360 + Flexible $827,001 = $4,710,166. Annual debt service is principal repayments per cash flow statement $1,175,343. Infrastructure expenses estimated as Operations & Maintenance $6,640,190 + Water & Wastewater $1,707,006 = $8,347,196. Deferred payouts-minors liability of $19,046,342 related to Waasa Gdi Naabmin Trust for minor beneficiaries. Solid waste closure liability $2,016,772.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
